description: A square designed graphic in ICE's 'THE WORST FIRST' rogues-gallery template, with a large red diagonal 'HOUSTON' banner across the bottom-right corner. The background is the standard desaturated, high-contrast black-and-white close-up of handcuffed human hands against a dark torso, used generically since the subject is identified by nationality and gang affiliation rather than name. The top-left headline is light cyan bold sans-serif 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL,' with white sub-line '1/26/2025 | Houston, TX.' Large white bold sans-serif reads 'Salvadoran MS-13 Gang Member.' Below is a 'CRIMES:' label with bulleted charges 'Terrorism' and 'Aggravated assault w/deadly weapon.' The DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark appear at bottom left. The fixed agency template couples an anonymized handcuffs image with a nationality/gang label and emphasized terrorism and violence charges as a propaganda technique to frame immigrant detainees as terroristic threats and justify removals. Target audience: the general public and immigration-enforcement supporters.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 1/26/2025 | Houston, TX; Salvadoran MS-13 Gang Member; CRIMES: Terrorism, Aggravated assault w/deadly weapon; HOUSTON; ICE
